properties.NAME: Powell Square Park
properties.NOTES: Established in 1889, this 1.4-acre neighborhood park is the department’s oldest. Amenities include multi-use playing field, picnic tables, shelter with restrooms and a playground.

properties.NOTES: There is $714.55 Asset Maintenance report and Overview cost variance. Tasks (800823, 806092, 811964, 809311, 812574) predate the asset being added to Cartegraph. As a result, these tasks aren’t included in the Overview.
